title: Game Accessibility Resources for Developers
creator: IGDA Game Accessibility SIG
description: A community-maintained starting page for developers and researchers, linking guidelines, methods, examples, publications, organizations, and specialist resources related to accessible games.
useful: It provides routes into a broader accessibility community and evidence base when one guideline set is not enough.
audience: Developers, researchers, educators, and advocates looking for further specialist material or collaborators.
learning: Find research for an unfamiliar access need
